hypothesis: A specificity-driven headline about Amazon (the #1 shopping destination) combined with a value-anchored CTA will outperform generic savings messaging by targeting the majority use case.

changes.headline: Never Pay Full Price on Amazon Again (Or 1,000+ Other Stores)
changes.cta_primary: Add to Chrome — Save on Your Next Order

rationale.headline: Leads with Amazon — the highest-traffic shopping site for most users. Parenthetical addition signals breadth without losing the primary hook. 'Never pay full price again' is a strong, aspirational promise. Tests store-specific targeting vs generic 'save money' framing.
rationale.cta_primary: 'Save on Your Next Order' is action-oriented and immediate. 'Your Next Order' implies the visitor will shop soon — meeting them where they are. Tests outcome-in-CTA vs feature-in-CTA ('Add to Chrome').
